raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 1414 increases the penalty for soliciting or purchasing a child for sex from a misdemeanor to a felony, with a requirement that 16 and 17-year-olds must be proven victims of human trafficking.",
    "Criminals have been advancing faster than legal measures in the fight against child sex trafficking.",
    "Senate Bill 1414 was shaped by the experiences of survivors of human trafficking.",
    "The enactment of Senate Bill 1414 is a step towards protecting children from child sex traffickers and buyers.",
    "Senate Bill 1414 reflects the efforts of survivors, advocates, and legislators committed to ending human trafficking in California.",
    "Senate Bill 1414 aims to ensure that those who seek to exploit children face the full force of the law.",
    "The legislation represents progress in protecting children from exploitation.",
    "Senate Bill 1414 is designed to strengthen the ability to protect victims and survivors of sex trafficking."
  ]
}
```
